begining: ^Alright… Time to get back to work. It’s only been three days since the murder of our regular customer, Zack. The police only left around lunchtime today, and they still haven’t fully solved the case. On top of that, the manager got reprimanded because most of the security cameras turned out to be fake dummies, which is why the case remains unsolved. Hopefully, he’ll take improving the bar’s security seriously in the near future.
^Since the manager decided to rebrand the bar, I need to go through the new cocktail menu he put together.
first_client: ^Same to you, John. What’ll you have to drink?
^Haven’t decided yet. Heard some guy got killed around here or something. So, how’s the investigation going? You keep talking while I figure out what to order from such a charming bartender~

^Long story short, the case is currently on hold due to a lack of evidence. But as for what happened, our regular got shot. There’s not much we can do right now, so all that’s left is to keep working.
^*I probably shouldn’t mention that the cameras were fake dummies…*
^*I wouldn’t want to stay in a place where someone got killed and there are security issues on top of that.*
^*Though now that I think about it, I’m still here… what a nightmare.*
^Mmm, I see. Well then, as they say: “May justice prevail, and may the culprit be found.
^This whole story inspired me to drink something strong, but smooth enough to go down easy.
^*bro is insane, how can murders inspire someone*
secret_reaction_John: ^God, this is damn good. That’s exactly why I love you, Miki.
^I’m glad you liked it. So, how have things been going for you?
^Oh, everything’s been fucking great. Bought myself a couple of new weapons for the collection.

^To celebrate, I’m planning a little private exhibition party for my people. It won’t just be my weapons on display — there’ll also be some interesting delicacies. Small and sweet ones… though I could probably find something else for you too, if you know what I mean... Ahem, you should come by as well~
^Um… Thanks, but I think I’ll pass. I still haven’t recovered from what happened here.

^You’re missing out on so much. You always find excuses. But Zack... Sure, he was a bit of a freak, but he never refused. I’d even say he came with particular enthusiasm. Though after him, I often had to deal with certain problems because of the trouble he caused...
great_reaction_John: ^Yeah… This is exactly what I wanted. Thanks!
^You’re welcome! So, how have things been going for you?

^Well, pretty much the usual: on weekdays I deal with disgusting idiots who can’t do their jobs properly, and on weekends I throw parties. Being the manager of a company full of morons is a thankless job. You think so too, don’t you, sweetheart?
^Money doesn’t come easy to anyone. Speaking of money, that guy Zack borrowed quite a large sum from me and never paid it back.
^Maybe fate punished him for it. I heard he borrowed money from pretty much everyone here.
ordinary_reaction_John: ^Well… it’s alright, I guess, though it could’ve been stronger. Thanks.
^I’ll try to satisfy your tastes better next time. So, how have things been going for you?
^Well, pretty much the usual, yeah. My wife and I are planning to go to a restaurant in a few days to celebrate her professional promotion as a dentist.
^Honestly, I like that we share the same interests, and she helps me out with the parties we organize together.
^I’d even say we live in the perfect harmony, sharing every moment and every desire together.
ending_John: ^Anyway, I’ve already talked too much. Time for me to go.
^Thanks for the drink. See you around, sweetheart.
^Thank you for coming! I was very GLAD to see you...
second_client: ^Welcome, what will you drink today, Rikky?
^I wanna drink something provocative, something thrilling. Preferably with ice.
secret_reaction_Rikky: ^You managed to satisfy my request. No wonder I keep coming to this bar. Though, to be fair, my mere presence already makes this place better. *light chuckle*
^A place is shaped by its visitors, that’s true.
^*and by the people who make them come to places like this - bartenders, for example*
^So, how have things been going for you, Rikky?
^Fucking terrible and great at the same time. Some bastard was sleeping with my wife. No, seriously, can you imagine - sleeping with MY wife?
^All women are the damn same. No matter how much you give them, it’s never enough. Any of them can be bought for the right price. Everyone has their price.
^Later I had a little man-to-man talk with that guy. He won’t be causing any trouble anymore. Ever.
^I’ll get rid of anyone who lays eyes on what’s mine.
great_reaction_Rikky: ^Well, not bad. You know how to serve a client, a man, THE man, don't you?
^Yeah, sure. I'm glad that you like it, Rikky...
^*today is a day of difficult people*
^How the investigation is going? Where is Zack now?
^Um... Where the dead body has to be. Unfortunately, it's on hold for now due to the lack of evidence.
^Great. I like our department of investigation. They always do some useless shit.
^Anyway, I think they do everything they can.
ordinary_reaction_Rikky: ^Next time it will be better. I can asure you.

^I'm so fed up with everything. Bitches here, dumb guys there. I'm surrounded by dumbasses. At least they were able to implemented new implants which can add to your sight some features. Wanna try them, huh?
^Totally understand you. I'm going to reject your offer. I have lots of things to do, so thank you for asking.
ending_Rikky: ^Anyway, it's time to go to my sweeties.
third_client: ^Good evening, Mikaela. What were you talking about?
^Got you. What are you wanna drink today?
^I would like to have something light, refreshing and delicate.
secret_reaction_Mikaela: ^That's divine. It is even better than crystals which I sell.
^Glad that you like it. That's my job - to bring joy to the people's lifes.
^Unrelated, but I heard that one of your clients and concurrently one of mine had died few days ago. Did he OD or what?
^I'm not really sure. However, he got shot in a head.
^That's kinda sad. He was spending lots of money on my goods. He was sweet as well. In every sense.
^I'm sorry for this question but could a person die because of them?
^You know, darling, people can die from any shit you can imagine. For example, if someone mix substances, a person would die without a doubt.
^Anyway, it is not my problem. Moreover, I'm not responsible for people's actions.
great_reaction_Mikaela: ^No, I'm just trying to figure out how you do it better with each time~
^I wanted to ask is it true, that my Zackie died?
^You are pretty chill when you talk about it.
^Every person that have come today asked me about this... um situation. So I cannot be emotional every time I talk about it.
^Understandable. Oh... It was a mistake to give him those crystals in advance. I didn't got my money back.
ordinary_reaction_Mikaela: ^Mhm... Well, Miki, usualy you do a better job than this.
^My bad, I'm still thinking about what happened that night.
^Yeah, poor Zackie... However, I think maybe it is a fate that I have to stop having situationships.
^You liked him though. Even if just for a bit.
^*I'm not going to mention that I know that they had fucked here every time they met each other*
ending_Mikaela: ^Well, it's time to go. Thanks for today.
thougth_Miki: ^*I don't think that somebody will come*
detective: ^Good evening, miss. I'm detective and I'm responsible for investigation of a bar crime. My name is Jonhovan.
^I would like to ask you some question if you don't mind.
^It's not hard to answer, so what is the first question?
^Well... Before I start, I want to warn you that EVERY your word can have an impact on the case. So, first question:
^1. Who do you think Zack had the closest relationship with among the regular customers?
second_question: ^2. Did any of the customers behave strangely?
third_question: ^3. Did Zack owe anything to anyone?
fourth_question: ^4. Do you think Zack had a bad relationship with someone?

s: ^He didn't had bad relationship with anyone

fifth_question: ^5. Which customer seems the most suspicious?

s: ^I don't think that suspect is among out frequenters.
